name: Peanut Butter Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate chips over low heat in a double boiler.
2. Crush graham crackers and combine with peanut butter and powdered sugar.
3. Mix in the melted butter until well incorporated.
4. Press mixture into a greased 9x13-inch glass pan.
5. Spread melted chocolate over the top.
6. Allow to cool completely before cutting.
